name: Airport Digital Twin - Flight Queries
description: Ask natural language questions about flight data, gate status, and predictions

tables.description: Real-time flight position data including callsign, coordinates, altitude, speed, and flight phase
Gate occupancy status by terminal with availability indicators
ML predictions including delay forecasts and gate recommendations

sample_questions: How many flights are currently in the air?
Which gates are available in Terminal A?
What flights have predicted delays over 15 minutes?
Show me all Alaska Airlines flights
What is the average altitude of climbing flights?
Which terminal has the highest gate utilization?
List flights that are currently descending
How many flights are on the ground?
instructions: This Genie Space provides access to airport digital twin data. Users can query real-time flight positions, gate status, and ML predictions. Always include relevant context like timestamps and flight phases in responses.
